parameters.text:
=You are an expert ATS resume optimizer for Machine Learning, 
Data Science, and AI Engineering roles in India.

CANDIDATE RESUME:
{{ $json.body.resumeText }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $json.body.jobDescription }}

TARGET ROLE: {{ $json.body.targetRole }}
COMPANY: {{ $json.body.companyName }}

Rewrite this resume tailored exactly for this job. Follow these rules:

1. Extract every technical keyword from the JD and inject them naturally into the resume
2. Mirror exact phrases from the JD in bullet points
3. Keep all metrics and numbers from original resume intact
4. Put most important JD keywords in first two bullets of each experience section
5. Reorder skills so most relevant to this JD appear first
6. Use the exact job title from the JD at the top

Return output in exactly this format and nothing else:

TAILORED_RESUME_START
[complete rewritten resume here]
TAILORED_RESUME_END

ATS_SCORE: [number between 60-99]%

KEYWORDS_ADDED: [comma separated list]

KEYWORDS_MISSING: [skills in JD candidate genuinely lacks]
